verification.subject: Verify your PlantSheep email
verification.heading: Welcome to PlantSheep!
verification.intro: To complete your registration, please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
verification.linkText: Or copy and paste this link:
verification.validity: This link is valid for 24 hours.
verification.ignoreText: If you didn't sign up for PlantSheep, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your PlantSheep password
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset for PlantSheep
passwordReset.intro: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to create a new password:
passwordReset.linkText: Or copy and paste this link:
passwordReset.validity: This link is valid for 1 hour.
passwordReset.ignoreText: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email.
